_meta.title: Membership pricing
_meta.note: ILLUSTRATIVE DEMO PRICING — not a real rate card. All figures are example monthly membership tiers for grounding only. The agent frames price as a recurring monthly commitment and value-per-month (plan R28).

sections.title: How pricing works
sections.text: Pricing is a monthly tiered membership, billed recurring each month. Each tier bundles a set number of tutoring hours per month at a lower effective per-hour rate than paying session-by-session. Hours can be used flexibly across 1:1, small-group, subject, or test-prep sessions. Members can change tiers month to month as their needs change. All prices below are illustrative demo figures, not a live rate card.

sections.title: Essential tier (illustrative)
sections.text: Essential tier: about $199 per month, recurring, bundling roughly 4 hours of tutoring per month (about $50 per hour effective). Best for light, steady support in a single subject. Illustrative demo pricing.

sections.title: Core tier (illustrative)
sections.text: Core tier: about $349 per month, recurring, bundling roughly 8 hours of tutoring per month (about $44 per hour effective). The most popular tier; good for weekly support across one or two subjects or steady test-prep progress. Illustrative demo pricing.

sections.title: Premier tier (illustrative)
sections.text: Premier tier: about $599 per month, recurring, bundling roughly 16 hours of tutoring per month (about $37 per hour effective). Best for intensive test prep on a deadline or multi-subject support. Illustrative demo pricing.

sections.title: Per-hour ranges by program (illustrative)
sections.text: Pay-as-you-go per-hour ranges (illustrative): 1:1 online tutoring runs roughly $55 to $75 per hour depending on subject and level; small-group sessions run roughly $30 to $45 per hour per student; test-prep is sold as a package tied to a test date rather than purely by the hour. Membership lowers the effective per-hour cost below these pay-as-you-go ranges.

sections.title: Test-prep packages (illustrative)
sections.text: Test-prep is offered as a package scoped to the student's target test date rather than open-ended hours. A typical SAT/ACT package (illustrative) spans 8 to 12 weeks, includes a diagnostic, a study plan, and practice sections, and is priced as a flat package; members can apply membership hours toward it. Pricing is demo data.
